programme.desc: In this new series, Prue Leith opens the doors to her Cotswold Kitchen, sharing cherished recipes, tips, and handy culinary hacks. The series is a celebration of food, friendship and fun вҖ“ with easy-to-cook recipes for every occasion!

programme.title: еҗҚе»ҡжӢӣзүҢиҸң[иӢұ]
My Greatest Dishes[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Angela Hartnett's Italian roots have shaped her culinary career for the last 3 decades. One of a handful of pioneering women to break through the glass ceiling, her ascent from pot washer to Michelin starred restaurant
programme.desc: Murano, is an inspiration for the young chefs who follow in her footsteps today.

programme.title: и—Қжө·дё–з•Ң[иӢұ]
Blue World[Eng]
programme.sub-title: д»ҠйӣҶ, ж”қиЈҪйҡҠеүҚеҫҖзҫҺеңӢвҖ§дҪӣи’ҷзү№.еңЁ1800е№ҙд»Ј, еӨ§йҮҸжқҗж–ҷиІЁзү©еҸҜз¶“йҒҺж°ҙи·ҜйҖІеҮәзҙҗзҙ„. йҖҸйҒҺжҺ§еҲ¶ж°ҙй–ҳзҡ„ж°ҙдҪҚ, жҲ–еҚҮжҲ–йҷҚ, еӨ§иҲ№д№ҹиғҪй§ӣйҒҺ. ж”қиЈҪйҡҠзҷјзҸҫеҸӨиҖҒйҒӢжІіиҲ№ж®ҳйӘёзөҰеҜ’еҶ·ж·Ўж°ҙдҝқеӯҳеҫ—еҫҲеҘҪ, йӮ„жңғжҸӯзӨәе°–еҳҙйӯҡеҸҠжө·йҰ¬зҡ„иіҮж–ҷ, еҫҲзІҫеҪ©!

In this episode, the Blue World team travels to Vermont, USA. In the 1800s, large quantities of materials could be transported by water to and from New York via a system of locks. By controlling the water level in the locks, large
programme.desc: boats can pass through. The crew find the wrecks of old canal boats remarkably well-preserved in the cold fresh water. Then, the biology of pipefish and seahorses is explored. It's really amazing!

programme.title: жҳҺзҸ йӣңиӘҢ[иӢұ]
Pearl Magazine[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Hong Kong's jobless rate has gone up to 3.8% from 3.2% a year ago. Experts say many job are lost to AI and there are more job seekers from the Greater Bay Area and other places competing for jobs here. / Those born with
programme.desc: disabilities must overcome many challenges in life. But that doesn't mean they cannot achieve great things. We follow two naturally born disabled persons and see how they overcome obstacles.

programme.title: з©№и’јдёӢзҡ„жҫіжҙІ[иӢұ]
Australia from Above[Eng]
programme.sub-title: The Outback is the vast heartland of Australia, an area spanning 5.6 million square kilometres and more than 70% of the continent. It is one of the least known and least populated places on earth renowned for its dramatic
programme.desc: mountain ranges, spectacular gorges, vast deserts, savannah plains and wetlands.

programme.title: жҲ‘иҰҒеҒҡе»ҡзҘһ : жҫіжҙІзҜҮ[иӢұ]
MasterChef Australia[Eng]
programme.sub-title: A brand new series of MasterChef Australia, with Andy, Melissa, and Jock bring us MasterChef Secrets & Surprises. The first surprise is the one and only Jamie Oliver! Former contestant Brent Draper, who withdrew from series
programme.desc: 13, returned as a contestant. 18 contestants have 90 minutes to create a secret weapon dish, and the winner gets the biggest advantage ever seen in MasterChef!

programme.title: жҲ‘иҰҒеҒҡе»ҡзҘһ : жҫіжҙІзҜҮ[иӢұ]
MasterChef Australia[Eng]
programme.sub-title: The contestants cook with anything that represents their secret weapon. Larissa, Rue and Alice are at the top, with Larissa's dish being considered the dish of the day and she received a 'second chance apron' as reward.
programme.desc: Should she be eliminated at any point in the competition, it will allow her to cook in the next elimination for a chance to regain her place in the kitchen.

programme.title: йҜҠйӯҡзҷҫз§‘[иӢұ]
Shark Dive TV[Eng]
programme.sub-title: In this episode, we dive with Greenland Sharks in the cold waters of Canada's Gulf of St Lawrence. We'll get a lesson on shark biology. The fact that sharks have survived so long demonstrates the incredible effectiveness of their
programme.desc: anatomy. Lastly, we take a Deeper Dive with a focus on Longtail Carpet Sharks and Basking Sharks.

programme.title: зҜҖжӢҚе°ҸеӨ©ең°[иӢұ]
Backyard Beats[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Join Monica as she builds DIY craft-struments from everyday items that can be found in a recycling bin. Along for the ride are Pro Musicians and Junior Jammers who visit the backyard for a jam session. Their instruments are the
programme.desc: inspiration for Monicas craftstruments builds. Each episode concludes with Monica and her friends making some Backyard Beats!

programme.title: жҳҺзҸ зө•иүІ:з§ҳеҜҶиҠұең’[иӢұ]
Pearl Spectacular:Secret Garden[Eng]
programme.sub-title: In a secluded Wye Valley garden, shifting light governs every hidden life. As spring wakes the woodland, tawny owls raise rival chicks, a bumblebee queen builds a colony, dippers feed young beneath the cottage,
programme.desc: and badgers roam after dark. From drought and predators to autumn's falling leaves, Robin and Laura's small garden reveals a secret world where timing, shelter and food decide who survives.

programme.title: жјҒжЁӮеӨ§еҶ’йҡӘ[иӢұ]
Red's Fishing Adventures[Eng]
programme.sub-title: дәһеҖ«е’Ңз°ЎжҒ©еҲ°дәҶдјҜйҰ¬еҗү. дјҜйҰ¬еҗүжҳҜйҮЈе®ўеӨ©е Ӯ, жҳҜжҫіжҙІжҘөдҪізҡ„йҮЈе ҙ. д»–еҖ‘зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜжЁҷиӘҢжҖ§еӨ§йӯҡ:йҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. йҰ–еӨ©зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜжўқзҙӢйҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. е№ҫз¶“еҠӘеҠӣ, е…©жўқйӯҡд»ҚжҳҜжәңиө°дәҶ. з¬¬дәҢеӨ©зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜй»‘йҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. д»–еҖ‘иғҪеҗҰдёҖйӣӘеүҚжҒҘ?

This episode takes Aaron and Kane to Bermagui. Known as an angler's paradise, Bermagui offers some of the best fishing in the country. They're on the hunt for one of the most iconic species found in these waters:
programme.desc: marlin. On the first day, they're after the striped marlin. Although they try hard, two fish are gone. They return the next day and aim at catching the black marlin. Can they make it?

Wild Wonders with Brooke[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Cheetahs are the fastest animal on our planet and Africa's most threatened big cat. In this episode, Brooke explores the Cheetah Reintroduction Project in the Zambezi Delta in Mozambique. She meets and learns from
programme.desc: researchers and vets about what it takes to bring a species back from extinction.

programme.sub-title: Scandinavia's northern extremes have been shaped by ice and fire, but it's the sun that reigns over these frozen kingdoms. Here, muskoxen, polar bears and arctic foxes must endure the long dark polar night, but in spring the
programme.desc: sun's return ignites a dramatic transformation in the landscape, and heralds the return of thousands of migrant visitors.

programme.title: дҝқиӮІз«ҘиЎҢ[иӢұ]
Wild Wonders with Brooke[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Cheetahs are the fastest animal on our planet and Africa's most threatened big cat. In this episode, Brooke explores the Cheetah Reintroduction Project in the Zambezi Delta in Mozambique. She meets and learns from
programme.desc: researchers and vets about what it takes to bring a species back from extinction.

programme.title: еӨ©ж°Је ұе‘Ҡ[иӢұ] еҸҠ 100йҒ“йўЁе‘і[иӢұ]
WEATHER REPORT[Eng] and Top 100 National Dishes[Eng]
еҘҮзҸҚз•°зҚё[иӢұ]
Extraordinary Animals[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Many scientists believe curiosity is a key driving force in evolution leading to both physical and behavioural adaptations and driving the development of new environments. This episode features some surprisingly
programme.desc: intelligent and uniquely curious animals: Australian Sea Lions, Parrots, Numbats, Portia Spiders, Brushtail Possums and Sea Snakes.

programme.title: и—Қжө·дё–з•Ң[иӢұ]
Blue World[Eng]
programme.sub-title: д»ҠйӣҶ, ж”қиЈҪйҡҠеүҚеҫҖзҫҺеңӢвҖ§дҪӣи’ҷзү№.еңЁ1800е№ҙд»Ј, еӨ§йҮҸжқҗж–ҷиІЁзү©еҸҜз¶“йҒҺж°ҙи·ҜйҖІеҮәзҙҗзҙ„. йҖҸйҒҺжҺ§еҲ¶ж°ҙй–ҳзҡ„ж°ҙдҪҚ, жҲ–еҚҮжҲ–йҷҚ, еӨ§иҲ№д№ҹиғҪй§ӣйҒҺ. ж”қиЈҪйҡҠзҷјзҸҫеҸӨиҖҒйҒӢжІіиҲ№ж®ҳйӘёзөҰеҜ’еҶ·ж·Ўж°ҙдҝқеӯҳеҫ—еҫҲеҘҪ, йӮ„жңғжҸӯзӨәе°–еҳҙйӯҡеҸҠжө·йҰ¬зҡ„иіҮж–ҷ, еҫҲзІҫеҪ©!

In this episode, the Blue World team travels to Vermont, USA. In the 1800s, large quantities of materials could be transported by water to and from New York via a system of locks. By controlling the water level in the locks, large
programme.desc: boats can pass through. The crew find the wrecks of old canal boats remarkably well-preserved in the cold fresh water. Then, the biology of pipefish and seahorses is explored. It's really amazing!

programme.title: йҜҠйӯҡзҷҫз§‘[иӢұ]
Shark Dive TV[Eng]
programme.sub-title: In this episode, we dive with Greenland Sharks in the cold waters of Canada's Gulf of St Lawrence. We'll get a lesson on shark biology. The fact that sharks have survived so long demonstrates the incredible effectiveness of their
programme.desc: anatomy. Lastly, we take a Deeper Dive with a focus on Longtail Carpet Sharks and Basking Sharks.

Flavors[Eng/Can]
programme.sub-title: Despite its international renown, Paris retains many mysteries. Along its bridges, gardens, palaces, and boulevards, the City of Light reveals a thousand faces full of joy or melancholy. Paris is an open-air museum that has spanned
programme.desc: the ages and inspired various artists. Its charm seems to have stopped time, inviting us on the most beautiful of journeys.

programme.title: жјҒжЁӮеӨ§еҶ’йҡӘ[иӢұ]
Red's Fishing Adventures[Eng]
programme.sub-title: дәһеҖ«е’Ңз°ЎжҒ©еҲ°дәҶдјҜйҰ¬еҗү. дјҜйҰ¬еҗүжҳҜйҮЈе®ўеӨ©е Ӯ, жҳҜжҫіжҙІжҘөдҪізҡ„йҮЈе ҙ. д»–еҖ‘зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜжЁҷиӘҢжҖ§еӨ§йӯҡ:йҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. йҰ–еӨ©зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜжўқзҙӢйҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. е№ҫз¶“еҠӘеҠӣ, е…©жўқйӯҡд»ҚжҳҜжәңиө°дәҶ. з¬¬дәҢеӨ©зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜй»‘йҰ¬жһ—йӯҡ. д»–еҖ‘иғҪеҗҰдёҖйӣӘеүҚжҒҘ?

This episode takes Aaron and Kane to Bermagui. Known as an angler's paradise, Bermagui offers some of the best fishing in the country. They're on the hunt for one of the most iconic species found in these waters:
programme.desc: marlin. On the first day, they're after the striped marlin. Although they try hard, two fish are gone. They return the next day and aim at catching the black marlin. Can they make it?

Breaking Dad (VI)[Eng/Can]
programme.sub-title: Father and son team Bradley and Barney Walsh are back on another breath-taking road trip. They head east to Asia, kicking things off in Japan's capital, Tokyo. First, they enjoy the sights in a Kei car, followed by a
programme.desc: highly unique shopping experience. Then a local guide takes them fighting in a sumo arena. After spending the night at a capsule hotel, they go to Arakawa Valley, where Bradley has to overcome his fear of heights.

programme.title: иұӘйҒҠеӨ©дёӢ[иӢұ]
Luxe Travels[Eng]
programme.sub-title: Cyprus is in an ideal location in the Mediterranean Sea, serene, dripping with history and mythology. This episode takes us to its ancient sites, idyllic villages, surprising discoveries, and of course, the best places to stay.
programme.desc: There are lots of fun activities, like diving, microlighting, or sailing. Yet, the most interesting part is you can learn to prepare the authentic local dish and coffee.

programme.title: The Agenda
The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and вҖңaccepted wisdomвҖқ to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You wonвҖҷt find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of todayвҖҷs world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from вҖңProve That Climate Change ExistsвҖқ to вҖңWho Will Win the Race to SpaceвҖқ. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: The Agenda
The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and вҖңaccepted wisdomвҖқ to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You wonвҖҷt find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of todayвҖҷs world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from вҖңProve That Climate Change ExistsвҖқ to вҖңWho Will Win the Race to SpaceвҖқ. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.
